entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER NOT NULL, `userId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `body` TEXT NOT NULL, `isFavourite` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_posts_userId
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_posts_userId` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`userId`)

indices.name: index_posts_isFavourite
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_posts_isFavourite` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`isFavourite`)

indices.name: index_posts_title
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_posts_title` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`title`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`email` TEXT NOT NULL, `password` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`email`))
